recommendations.title: Children of the Corn III: Urban Harvest
recommendations.overview: After a couple adopts a pair of orphaned brothers, it becomes alarmingly clear the boys are much more than they seem.

recommendations.title: Made in Italy
recommendations.overview: A bohemian artist travels from London to Italy with his estranged son to sell the house they inherited from his late wife.

recommendations.title: Angry Video Game Nerd: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Based on the hit web series of the same name, a disgruntled gamer must overcome his fear of the worst video game of all time in order to save his fans. Hilarity ensues as a simple road trip becomes an extravagant pursuit of the unexpected.

recommendations.title: Auntie Edna
recommendations.overview: Taking place during the events of Incredibles 2, Edna Mode babysits Jack-Jack.

recommendations.title: Jack and the Cuckoo-Clock Heart
recommendations.overview: Jack is born with his heart frozen solid on the coldest day in history. A wise midwife saves him by replacing it with a cuckoo clock. Now Jack must abide by three rules to keep his mechanical heart safe: never touch the clock's hands, master his ange

recommendations.title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
recommendations.overview: A giant alligator goes head to head with a giant Anaconda. The town sheriff must find a way to destroy the two monsters before they kill the whole town.

recommendations.title: Within Our Gates
recommendations.overview: Abandoned by her fiancé, an educated black woman with a traumatizing past dedicates herself to helping a near bankrupt school for impoverished black children.

recommendations.title: Jack-Jack Attack
recommendations.overview: The Parrs' baby Jack-Jack is thought to be normal, not having any super-powers like his parents or siblings. But when an outsider is hired to watch him, Jack-Jack shows his true potential.

recommendations.title: Stone

recommendations.title: The Trust
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Drama, Crime, Action, Comedy, Mystery
recommendations.overview: A pair of cops investigating a drug invasion stumble upon a mysterious bank vault.
